Mtn To Quash Out-Of-State Commission And/Or For Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ron Herron, Esq. and Mia Mattis, Esq. of Harowitz & Tigerman (788-1588) on behalf of the Plaintiffs/moving party; J. Rae Lovko, Esquire of Paul, Hanley & Harley (510-559-9980) on behalf of the 3rd party Kenneth Cohen; and Donna L. Maul, Esquire of Brydon, Hugo & Parker (808-0300) on behalf of Defendant Pneumo Abex. Court reporter: Renee Bush, CSR #5793.

Hearing was held. Plaintiff's motion to quash out-of-stated commission and/or for prtective order third party Kenneth Cohen's motion to quash out-of-state commission is granted as the witness has not been designated as an expert witness on Plaintiff's pared down witness list. As the motion seeks an order to protect rights of nonparty witness the motion is denied. The Information sought by the subpoena is relevant, and weighing any right of privacy against its probative value, the court finds that the witness' right to privacy does not prevail. If the witness is disclosed on Plaintiffs' pared down expert witness list, the would entertain an order shortening time to obtain the records requested. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT (612)
